allow: Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const m=require\('mysql2'\); const c=m.createConnection\({host:process.env.HOST_NAME,port:parseInt\(process.env.DB_PORT||'3306'\),user:process.env.USER_NAME,password:process.env.PASSWORD,database:process.env.DBNAME}\); c.connect\(e=>{if\(e\){console.log\('CONN FAIL:',e.message\)}else{c.query\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) as n FROM user_wallets WHERE user_id=?',['urkjxfb2zefqmvsml'],\(err,r\)=>{console.log\('wallet:',err?err.message:JSON.stringify\(r\)\); c.query\('SELECT * FROM users_profile WHERE user_id=?',['urkjxfb2zefqmvsml'],\(e2,r2\)=>{console.log\('profile rows:',e2?e2.message:r2.length\); c.end\(\);}\)}\)}}\);")
